title: streptanthus glandulosus var. secundus
intro: Streptanthus glandulosus var. secundus, also known as the glandular false spring beauty or sticky false spring beauty, is a rare, biennial or perennial plant species belonging to the genus Streptanthus and the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and stems, which contain compounds with potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Streptanthus glandulosus var. secundus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
